title: Simple validation of HTML forms using Flask

content.problemStatement:
Previously, we learned how to work with HTML forms and accept user inputs and store them in our Python code.

We can also perform additional simply operations like:
1. Validate data on server side. For example 
- Check if the phone number is of a certain length.
- Check that the name should only contain alphabets (lower case or upper case).

2. Search data from the back-end and show it at the front-end. For example
- Check if the username already exist in the database.
- Find the recipe of the given dish.

Lets us review this in the form of a worked example.
